title: Admin Eye Pipe Server — Self-Respawn + Hot-Swap Deferral
desc: Named pipe server (wkappbot_elevated) inside admin Eye. Handles admin commands, defers hot-swap while busy, and self-respawns on binary update using own elevated token — no UAC.
steps: 3. HandleClient: ReadAsync EyeProxyRequest → ExecuteCommand → WriteAsync response
5. __eye_tick__ special: returns cached Eye loop state without subprocess
Dual FSW 감시: .new.exe 등장(조기 drain) + .exe 직교체(fast-path) 동시
.new.exe path: IsBusy drain → .new.exe 소멸 대기(swap 확인) → spawn successor
.exe path: drain 중이면 자연 완료, 아니면 즉시 spawn
Process.Start(UseShellExecute=false, 'eye --elevated') — 부모 elevated 토큰 상속, UAC 없음
drainTriggered flag: 두 FSW 동시 발화 시 중복 spawn 방지
startup 시 .new.exe 이미 있으면 즉시 drain 시작
author: claude
